title: An Act relative to liquor licenses in the town of East Bridgewater

abstracts.abstract: By Representatives Plouffe of Brockton and Sullivan-Almeida of Abington, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5130) of Bridget Plouffe (by vote of the town) that the town of East Bridgewater be authorized to issue up to four additional licenses for the sale of all alcoholic beverages not to be drunk on the premises in said town.  Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

related_entities.name: committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 06/23/2026 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in B-1
